leadText: Flash Cannon (Japanese: ラスターカノン Luster Cannon) is a damage-dealing Steel-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM91 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM54 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR70 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM093 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM084 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Flash Cannon does damage and has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Special Defense by one stage. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Flash Cannon has a 20% chance of lowering the target's defensive stats for three turns. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. It may also lower the foe's Sp. Def stat. (move) The user gathers all its light energy and releases it in one shot. It may also lower the foe's Sp. Def stat. (TM) PBR The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. It may also lower the foe's Sp. Def stat. B W B2 W2 The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The user gathers all its light energy and releases it all at once. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat. LA The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. This may also lower the target’s defensive stats. ZA The user attacks by gathering its internal light energy and releasing it all at once. This may also lower the targets' Sp. Def stats.
